title: bulbophyllum ochraceum
intro: Bulbophyllum ochraceum, also known as the Yellow Bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Bulbophyllum genus. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Bulbophyllum ochraceum include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve extracting its essential oils or using the leaves and flowers in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
